title: On the entire self-shrinking solutions to Lagrangian mean curvature flow II
author_string: Rongli Huang, Qianzhong Ou, Wenlong Wang
abstract: We show Bernstein type results for the entire self-shrinking solutions to Lagrangian mean curvature flow in $(\mathbb{R}^n\times\mathbb{R}^n, g_τ)$. The proofs rely on a priori estimates and barriers construction.
